zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Findern於1390年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾辛分時，她的父親John II Findern ,The Elder,25歲，母親Catherine Downes21歲。她於1415年與William Booth在英國英格蘭德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1484年在英國德比夏爾辛分享年94歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Findern于1390年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾辛分时，她的父亲John II Findern ,The Elder,25岁，母亲Catherine Downes21岁。她于1415年与William Booth在英国英格兰德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1484年在英国德比夏爾辛分享年94岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾。

nameMeanings.name: Findern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from Middle High German vinder ‘inventor’, possibly a nickname for a teller of tall stories or a person of great ingenuity.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Findern was born in 1390, in Sinfin, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John II Findern ,The Elder,, was 25 and her mother, Catherine Downes, was 21. She married William Booth in 1415, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1484, in Sinfin, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 94, and was buried in Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Findern est née en 1390, à Sinfin, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John II Findern ,The Elder,, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Catherine Downes, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé William Booth en 1415, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1484, à Sinfin, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterrée à Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Findern 1390 in Sinfin, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John II Findern ,The Elder, 25 und ihre Mutter Catherine Downes 21. Sie hat 1415 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom William Booth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1484 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Sinfin, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Findern è nata il nel 1390 nel Sinfin, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John II Findern ,The Elder,, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Catherine Downes, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato William Booth nel 1415, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1484, nel Sinfin, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 94 anni, e fu sepolta a Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Findernが1390年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアシンフィンで生まれた時，父John II Findern ,The Elder,は25歳，母Catherine Downesは21歳であった。1415年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアでWilliam Boothと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1484年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアシンフィンで94歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Findern(이)가 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 신핀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John II Findern ,The Elder,(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Downes(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 William Booth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1484년 영국 더비실르 신핀에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Findern nasceu em 1390, em Sinfin, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John II Findern ,The Elder,, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Downes, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com William Booth em 1415, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1484, em Sinfin, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 94 anos, e foi sepultada em Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Findern родилась в 1390 г. в местности синфин, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John II Findern ,The Elder, было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Downes, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Booth в 1415 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1484 г. в местности синфин, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 94 лет и была похоронена в местности дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Findern nació en 1390, en Sinfin, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John II Findern ,The Elder,, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Catherine Downes, tenía 21 años. Se casó con William Booth en 1415, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1484, en Sinfin, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 94 años, y fue sepultada en Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
